name: printel
description: A modern e-commerce platform powered by EverShop

scripts.build:extensions: npm --workspace @printel/theme run compile && npm --workspace @printel/legal-footer run compile && npm --workspace @printel/cookie-banner run compile && npm --workspace @printel/print-on-demand run compile && npm --workspace @printel/anaf-efactura run compile
scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit -p extensions/printelTheme/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p extensions/printelLegalFooter/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p extensions/printelCookieBanner/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p extensions/printelPrintOnDemand/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p extensions/printelAnafEfactura/tsconfig.json
